findings.message: BuildScript.BuildWindows was added as a public static Unity editor entry point callable through -executeMethod BuildScript.BuildWindows.
BuildScript.BuildWindows collects enabled Build Settings scenes and fails if none are configured.
BuildScript.BuildWindows targets StandaloneWindows64 and writes to the ignored generated path Build/Windows/EscapeFromNightmares.exe under the Unity project root.
BuildScript.BuildWindows throws when BuildPipeline.BuildPlayer reports a non-succeeded BuildResult.
Unity MCP script validation reported zero diagnostics for BuildScript.cs.
Unity MCP build scene inspection confirmed Assets/Scenes/Stage1.unity is enabled.
Unity generated BuildScript.cs.meta after a forced asset refresh.

not_run.name: BuildScript.BuildWindows
not_run.reason: This Harness unit adds and validates the build entry point only; generating the final Windows player build is the next unit.
